mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_danmaku (danmaku_id, task_id, bvid, content, dm_time, appear_time, sentiment_score, sentiment_label) VALUES
(#{danmaku.danmakuId}, #{danmaku.taskId}, #{danmaku.bvid}, #{danmaku.content}, #{danmaku.dmTime}, #{danmaku.dmTime}, #{danmaku.sentimentScore}, #{danmaku.sentimentLabel})
mapper.select: SELECT danmaku_id AS danmakuId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, content, dm_time AS dmTime, appear_time AS appearTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY dm_time ASC

SELECT danmaku_id AS danmakuId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, content, dm_time AS dmTime, appear_time AS appearTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY dm_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
